blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
